provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, a Keth arthropod alien who has ended up in the Sable Reach, shorter than human with warm ivory chitin showing stress cracks from poor nutrition, four arms with the lower pair holding improvised tools, compound eyes dulled, wearing scraps of what was once a Keth bio-film harness now dry and cracking overlaid with salvaged human thermal fabric tied in place with wire, the original colony glyph on the thorax has been scored through, this is someone cut off from the Communion
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Alt seed Keth exile. Consistent insectoid look.
